data.title: RED test: Gate 2b integration in fix-bug SKILL.md
data.description:
Create tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2b.py with structural validation tests for Gate 2b in SKILL.md.

Tests:
1. test_gate_2b_section_exists — SKILL.md contains Gate 2b section
2. test_gate_2b_dispatches_script — references gate-2b-blast-radius.sh
3. test_gate_2b_modifier_only — section explicitly states modifier, documents it never adds primary signal
4. test_gate_2b_post_investigation — Gate 2b appears after investigation/fix proposal
5. test_gate_2b_annotation_in_dialog — documents that annotation is appended to escalation dialog context
6. test_gate_2b_failure_fallback — documents graceful degradation (skip annotation silently on error)
7. test_gate_2b_ast_grep_fallback — documents grep fallback when ast-grep unavailable

Docstring: structural metadata validation — design contract verification.
Append to existing .test-index comma-separated entry for fix-bug/SKILL.md (format: append ", tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2b.py" to existing line).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2b.py
- [ ] At least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2b.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry updated
  Verify: grep 'fix-bug/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test_fix_bug_gate_2b'
